I

Identifiable - Interface in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.data
An identifiable object that has an ID number (integer)
inOrder() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.AbstractBinaryTree
The code for this method is based on the mergesort algorithm on page 341 in the course textbook "Data Structures and Algorithms" by Goodrich, Tamassia, Goldwasser.
inOrder() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.BinaryTree
Returns an Iterable collection of positions that represent the inorder traversal of positions within the tree
InsertionSorter<E> - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter
InsertionSorter uses the insertion sort algorithm to sort data.
InsertionSorter() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.InsertionSorter
contructor for insertion sorter which sets the comparator to null
InsertionSorter(Comparator<E>) - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.InsertionSorter
constructor for insertion sorter that sets the comparator to the parameter
InsertionSorterTest - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter
Test cases for the InsertionSorter
InsertionSorterTest() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.InsertionSorterTest
 
isEmpty() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.AbstractList
checks to see if the list is empty and if it is return true
isEmpty() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List
Returns true if the list is empty; otherwise, returns false
isEmpty() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.positional.PositionalLinkedList
checks if the list is empty
isEmpty() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.positional.PositionalList
Returns true if the list is empty, otherwise return false.
isEmpty() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.AbstractMap
checks if the list is empty
isEmpty() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.map.Map
Returns true if the map contains no entries, otherwise returns false
isEmpty() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.queue.AbstractQueue
 
isEmpty() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.queue.Queue
Returns true if the queue contains no elements, otherwise returns false
isEmpty() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.stack.AbstractStack
 
isEmpty() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.stack.Stack
Returns true if the stack contains no elements, otherwise returns false
isEmpty() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.AbstractTree
checks to see if the tree is empty
isEmpty() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.Tree
Returns true if the tree contains no elements, otherwise return false
isInternal(Position<E>) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.AbstractTree
checks if position is an internal node
isInternal(Position<E>) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.Tree
Returns true if the provided position has at least 1 child
isLeaf() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.LinkedBinaryTreeTest
Test the output of the isLeaf behavior
isLeaf(Position<E>) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.AbstractTree
returns true if the position is at a leaf node
isLeaf(Position<E>) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.Tree
Returns true if the provided position has no children
isRoot() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.LinkedBinaryTreeTest
Test the output of the isRoot(p)
isRoot(Position<E>) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.AbstractTree
checks to see if position is at a root node
isRoot(Position<E>) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.tree.Tree
Returns true if the provided position is the root of the tree
